summary: Iter19 UX-cleanup verification. Both changes from main agent verified end-to-end: (1) Revise button now correctly hidden on already-converted quotes, correctly visible on approved-unconverted + sent, correctly hidden on draft. (2) ContactDetail delete button gated by linked-quotes check — disabled with tooltip on linked contact, enabled with confirm modal on unlinked; Cancel closes without API hit; Confirm hits DELETE, redirects to /contacts, and contact returns 404. Full backend regression (iter9→iter19): 105 passed / 6 skipped / 0 failed.

issues: Pre-existing /api/uploads/*.png 404s still polluting console (36 files) — explicitly deferred by problem statement; not in scope.

critical_code_review_comments: QuotationView.jsx:184 — Revise gate correctly reads `quote.status !== 'draft' && !quote.order_id`. Verified against all 4 quote states (draft, sent, approved-unconverted, approved-converted).

ContactDetail.jsx — Uses `quotes.length > 0` as the linked-records check, applied to both the `disabled` attribute AND the tooltip text. Note: backend also blocks contacts with linked ORDERS, but the UI only checks quotes. In practice an order always has a parent quote so the two are equivalent, but a hardened UI could also fetch orders count. Non-blocking.
Modal implementation is clean: backdrop click cancels, e.stopPropagation() on inner container prevents accidental close, confirm button has loading state (`Deleting…`), all buttons have data-testid.
Toast + navigate order in handleDelete is correct: toast.success fires immediately before navigate('/contacts') — confirmed visible in screenshot.
Error path on handleDelete resets confirmingDelete (line 35) so the modal closes cleanly on 400/409 from backend — good UX.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration19_revise_gate_and_contact_delete.py (new — 5 tests: revise-gate data invariants, double-convert 409, contact-delete linked guard, contact-delete unlinked success + 404 verification)
/app/backend/.env (RESTRICT_OUTBOUND_TO_PHONE set to +918200663263 during run, RESTORED to blank at teardown + backend restarted)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (quote-state matrix 4/4; contact delete linked=disabled+correct tooltip; contact delete unlinked → modal → cancel closes → reopen → confirm → DELETE 200 → redirect /contacts → 404 on subsequent GET; success toast visible)

seed_data_creation: Created fresh test contact 'DeleteMe QA UI' (company TEST_UI_DEL) via POST /api/contacts during UI run, then deleted it via the UI confirm modal — no residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter19 is a clean pass. Revise-gate + Contact Delete UX are production-ready. State-matrix regression covers all 4 quote states + all 3 contact scenarios (linked/unlinked-cancel/unlinked-confirm). LIVE mode restored (RESTRICT_OUTBOUND_TO_PHONE blank). Only open item across the whole app is the pre-existing 36 /api/uploads/*.png 404s which main agent has explicitly deferred.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Both iter18 UX action items were addressed correctly by main agent and verified via new pytest suite + Playwright UI walkthrough.
